Microsoft Power Pages documentation

Create external-facing websites that allow users outside organizations to sign in with various identities, create and view data in Dataverse, or browse content anonymously.

Page last updated: 2025-06-28

Sections:
- Getting started
  - What is Power Pages
  - Power Pages capabilities
  - Create and manage sites
  - Security overview
  - Architecture and security white papers

- Tutorials
  - Tutorials and training videos overview
  - Design home page
  - Set up brand kit
  - Create page with list
  - Create page with simple form
  - Configure site authentication

- Design and build
  - Design studio
  - Pages workspace
  - Styling workspace
  - Templates
  - Portal Management app
  - VS Code and Power Platform CLI
  - Plan your project

- AI and Copilot
  - AI-powered and Copilot features overview
  - Create AI-generated form using Copilot
  - Add AI-generated text using Copilot
  - Enable agent in your site
  - Force Bing webmaster to index your site

- Connect to Dataverse
  - Dataverse and Power Pages
  - Data workspace
  - Lists, forms, multistep forms
  - Table permissions
  - Create, update, and view Dataverse information

- Customize and extend
  - Liquid, Web templates, Portals web API, Code components
  - Power Automate cloud flows integration
  - Advanced configuration

- Security
  - Authentication, Web roles, Table permissions
  - Architecture and security white papers

- Go live
  - Checklist, Licensing, ALM

- Administer and monitor
  - Portals admin center
  - Diagnostics
  - Maintenance and updates
  - Consumption reports
